description: Capability set granted to the main window. Slice T2 shipped the core baseline. Slice T4 added dialog:allow-open + fs:allow-read-text-file for native file open. Slice T5 adds dialog:allow-save + fs:allow-write-text-file for native file save. Later slices: Slice T6 adds a path scope for the autosave directory; Slice T7 adds menu/window permissions for the native menu wiring.
